pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 11 to 17 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 11 APIs and bytecode, failing to utilize or enforce Java 17 features and potentially causing compatibility issues if Java 17-specific code is introduced.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JAXB API dependency to resolve missing javax.xml.bind classes required by the Coveralls plugin on JDK 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: JAXB API was removed from the JDK module system in Java 11. Without explicitly adding the dependency, the build fails with ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError for javax.xml.bind classes when running the Coveralls plugin.
